final:
module DFlipFlop (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire D,
    output reg Q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset) begin
            Q <= 0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
endmodule
